description: Publishes the bamboo-pan fork package identity as `@bamboo-pan/trellis` with fork README packaging and npm release metadata. No new migrations.
changelog:
**Fork Distribution:**
- Publish the CLI as `@bamboo-pan/trellis` with repository, homepage, issue tracker, workspace scripts, CI, and release checks targeting the fork package.
- Copy `README_FORK.md`, `README_FORK_CN.md`, and the repository license into the package during `prepublishOnly` so the npm page documents fork-only distribution changes.

**Verification Notes:**
- Typecheck and build passed for the fork package.
- Full tests and lint had known pre-existing Windows/CRLF and unused-import failures unrelated to the fork package identity.
notes: RC install: `npm install -g @bamboo-pan/trellis@rc`. Projects on 0.5 beta or earlier rc can run `trellis update`; rc.3 adds no migration entries.
